revision.comment: few uncontroversial changes: use [[Template:cat handler]], automatically populate [[:Category:Inline cleanup templates]], adjust whitespace
don't categorise template sandboxes
fix per Anomie
rm |template=[[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] - you can't do that. Navboxes use these templates.
remove "all..." cats, cut down on category clutter.
add detection for template substitution and populate [[:Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates]]
populate tracking category [[:Category:Templates needing substitution checking]]
lowercase
fix for mouseover text, per [[User:Bility]]
link
From [[Template:Fix/sandbox]] per talk page
Temp code to fins any substcheck's left.
remove un-neede parameter and temp code.
changed display of Month-Year to "(Month Year)" as discussed on talk page
fix misplaced closing parenthesis - it shouldn't show if |date= is blank or omitted

if the noprint and inline-template classes need to be preserved, according to the docs, then why not enforcing in the code rather than asking people to do it (and relying on them reading the docs attentively enough not to miss that)?
delink tooltip to prevent rendering errors, suggested by [[User:SMcCandlish]]
replaced self-closed <nowiki/> and space with numeric space entity;
fix for quotation marks
shouldn't be here
per request
Per edit request

revision.comment: few uncontroversial changes: use [[Template:cat handler]], automatically populate [[:Category:Inline cleanup templates]], adjust whitespace
don't categorise template sandboxes
fix per Anomie
rm |template=[[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] - you can't do that. Navboxes use these templates.
remove "all..." cats, cut down on category clutter.
add detection for template substitution and populate [[:Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates]]
populate tracking category [[:Category:Templates needing substitution checking]]
lowercase
fix for mouseover text, per [[User:Bility]]
link
From [[Template:Fix/sandbox]] per talk page
Temp code to fins any substcheck's left.
remove un-neede parameter and temp code.
changed display of Month-Year to "(Month Year)" as discussed on talk page
fix misplaced closing parenthesis - it shouldn't show if |date= is blank or omitted

if the noprint and inline-template classes need to be preserved, according to the docs, then why not enforcing in the code rather than asking people to do it (and relying on them reading the docs attentively enough not to miss that)?
delink tooltip to prevent rendering errors, suggested by [[User:SMcCandlish]]
replaced self-closed <nowiki/> and space with numeric space entity;
fix for quotation marks
shouldn't be here
per request
Per edit request
